name: Chest
description: A chest containing three random items.

name: Boss Chest
description: A chest found after defeating a boss, containing three random high quality items.

name: Crossroads
description: Occurs at the 16th stage of the Corrupted Forest. Choose one of three paths that lasts until the next Forge Area:

choices.name: Easy Path
choices.description: When entering a Combat Area, enemies lose 20% of their health.

choices.name: Calm Path
choices.description: Restore 3 health when entering a new Area.

choices.name: Hard Path
choices.description: Combat Areas have stronger enemies and offer better loot.

name: Golden Chest
description: A fancier chest that contains three random fancy pieces of loot.

name: Forge
description: The forge is used to upgrade your equipment. You get three upgrades by default, but this can be increased by masteries. Combine three items to craft a new one:

choices.name: Same rarity
choices.description: Using three items of the same rarity results in an item of a higher rarity.

choices.name: Different rarities
choices.description: Using three items of different rarities results in a random item of the highest rarity among those used.

choices.name: Upgraded items
choices.description: Using three upgraded items results in an upgraded item. If all of them are level 3, the resulting item will be too.

choices.name: Mythic items
choices.description: You can't obtain Mythic items in the forge.

name: Potions
description: A random stranger drops two potions for you. If you're Liz, you get three.

name: Remains of a Hero
description: Occurs at the 16th stage of Path to the Core. Choose one of three trinkets:

name: Shrine
description: Appears at the 20th and 40th area of each room. Choose one of two blessings:

choices.name: Hammer
choices.description: Upgrades one of your equipped items.

name: Skill Book
description: Appears at the 8th area of each room. Choose a new mastery to unlock.

name: Well
description: Occurs at the 24th and 36th area of each room. Choose one of three boons:

choices.name: Boon of Power
choices.description: Gain a permanent random stat boost.

choices.name: Boon of Prosperity
choices.description: Obtain a random Uncommon item at level 3.
